level_signals: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5-7+ years experience in product development of highly technical products.
Past experience in Product Management or other similar product development roles at or above the level of Senior Product Manager.
must_haves.qualifier: at or above Senior Product Manager level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience crafting and tailoring a message for potential customers, including executives.
Ability to communicate highly technical concepts to both non-technical and technically proficient audiences, including recent AI developments.
Degree in a technical or related field, or equivalent professional experience.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: AI-related experience (experience with product development for AI agents a plus).
Some coding experience with React, Typescript, and Go.
MBA or equivalent professional experience (while this is a product management role, you will have the opportunity to lean into broader business roles).
Past roles that interface with end customers to influence software development.

scope.surface: Enterprise AI agent platform for customer experience; building and shipping AI agents handling thousands of customer conversations daily
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer business outcomes driven by AI agents
core_responsibilities: Partner directly with engineers and customers to build and ship AI agents that handle thousands of customer conversations a day
Prepare and present demonstrations of Sierra's agent
Address and overcome technical challenges in the business process by working with technical counterparts
Develop and improve Sierra virtual agents to fit and anticipate customers' needs and business processes
Become trusted advisors and drive strategic technical strategies for customers
Work with Sierra's engineering and product development teams to scope and implement new features essential to the success of customers

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans

green_flags: High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong industry credibility
Clear product surface with real customer impact (thousands of AI conversations per day)
Encourages applicants even if experience doesn't precisely match the job description
Strong values articulation with explicit commitment to work-life balance
Broad set of benefits including parental leave and fertility support
red_flags: Primarily in-person company based in San Francisco — eliminates remote candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization policy not stated
5-7+ years range is broad and minimum threshold unclear for a 'hard' screen

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and 'at or above Senior PM' language)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description — enterprise AI platform for customer experience)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
ambiguities: Years range stated as '5-7+ years' — unclear whether 5 or 7 is the true minimum threshold; treated as minimum 5 with qualifier.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are entirely absent from the JD; left as 'unclear'.
The role blends traditional PM work with customer-facing solutions engineering; some responsibilities overlap with Sales Engineering or Solutions Architect archetype.
